title: B2B Growth Marketer
description: The best B2B technology companies already know that founder- and executive-led content is one of the strongest pipeline channels there is. What holds them back is the doing: positioning is fuzzy, the right angle is hard to find, time is scarce, and staying consistent over months is harder still. Closing that gap – building the go-to-market foundation and turning a busy expert's knowledge into content that actually moves their business – is what you'll do. As a B2B Growth Marketer, you'll own part of the growth motion for a portfolio of clients: from go-to-market strategy and positioning, to a running LinkedIn engine, to the content itself.
